description: Large pothole near the school crosswalk has caused two bicycle accidents this week.
Overflowing trash bins along the promenade are attracting pests and smell terrible.
Three streetlights are dark near the playground and parents feel unsafe after sunset.
Traffic signal at King Street is stuck on red and causing major congestion.
Wheelchair ramp outside the clinic is blocked by construction barriers.
Residents report illegal dumping behind the bus depot with waste piling up for days.
Broken fence in the park exposes children to a steep drop near the creek.
Water leak on Cedar Lane has been flowing for two days and may flood nearby shops.
Graffiti and shattered glass remain at the main plaza after the weekend event.
Power outage affecting pharmacy refrigeration and several elderly residents.
Missing pedestrian crossing paint near the school entrance is creating a hazard.
Missed garbage collection for the second time this week on Marina Block A.
